# Amazon Eco Travellers

Expert naturalist-guided Amazon eco tours departing from Manaus, Brazil.

## About

Amazon Eco Travellers offers immersive multi-day expeditions and day excursions into the Brazilian Amazon rainforest. All tours depart from Manaus, Amazonas, Brazil. Guides are specialist naturalists — not biologists — with deep knowledge of Amazonian ecosystems, wildlife, and indigenous culture.

## Tours

### Multi-day expeditions
- **Amazon Explorers** — 5 days / 4 nights. Rio Negro basin, canopy tower, flooded igapó forest, pink river dolphin habitat, eco-lodge + riverboat. /tours/amazon-explorers/
- **River Explorer** — 5 days / 4 nights. Rio Negro upriver, MUSA canopy tower, Anavilhanas National Park, indigenous village visit. /tours/river-explorer/
- **Chlorophyll** — 6 days / 5 nights. Five ecosystems: canopy, igapó, terra firme, várzea, riverine community. /tours/chlorophyll/
- **Birdwatching** — 7 days / 6 nights. Ornithologist-guided, 600+ potential species, Cock-of-the-Rock arena, Anavilhanas floodplain. /tours/birdwatching/
- **Ecological Expedition** — 8 days / 7 nights. Most comprehensive route. Ducke Reserve canopy to Madeira River. /tours/ecological-expedition/
- **Jungle Lodge Expedition** — 3 days / 2 nights. Meeting of the Waters, riverside lodge, piranha fishing, caiman search, jungle walk. /tours/jungle-lodge-3days/
- **Amazon Lodge** — 2 days / 1 night. Overnight lodge stay, dolphins, piranha fishing, caiman search. From R$1,000/person. /tours/amazon-lodge/
- **Jungle Retreat** — 4 days / 3 nights. Manaus historic market, Meeting of the Waters, lodge + jungle camp, caboclo community. /tours/jungle-retreat/
- **The Full Amazon** — 5 days / 4 nights. Most culturally complete: dolphins, indigenous overnight stay, optional Ayahuasca ceremony. /tours/amazon-complete/
- **Amazon Expedition** — 6 days / 5 nights. Lodge + remote tapiri camp at Lago do Arara, survival techniques, deep forest walks. From R$4,200/person. /tours/amazon-expedition/

### Day excursions
- **Pink Dolphins & Indigenous Village** — 1 day from Manaus. /tours/pink-dolphins/
- **Ariau River & Rio Negro** — 1 day from Manaus. /tours/ariau-river/
- **Pink Dolphins & Anavilhanas** — 1 day from Manaus. R$1,100/person. /tours/anavilhanas/
- **Presidente Figueiredo** — 1 day, waterfalls & caves. /tours/presidente-figueiredo/

## Key information

- **Departures:** Manaus, Amazonas, Brazil
- **Languages:** English, Portuguese, Spanish, German
- **Group sizes:** Private & small group (minimum 2 participants)
- **Contact:** WhatsApp +55 92 99132-1047 | info@amazonecotravellers.com
- **Website:** https://amazonecotravellers.com
